supportLevel: Unofficial public Microsoft Fabric status mirror based on HTML scraping

active.detailsHtml:
Fabric customers in Northcentral US region may experience issues while connecting to SQL endpoints and executing SQL Queries for warehouse artifacts.
Engineers are actively investigating the issue, and an update will be provided soon
active.detailsText: Fabric customers in Northcentral US region may experience issues while connecting to SQL endpoints and executing SQL Queries for warehouse artifacts. Engineers are actively investigating the issue, and an update will be provided soon
